fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted inventory pick line.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location at which the items were pick.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for informational use.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that was picked.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the item that was picked.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item that was picked.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that was picked.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity, in the base unit of measure, of the item that was picked.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity must be completed.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of destination associated with the posted inventory pick line.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or the code of the customer or vendor linked to the line.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number for the item that was picked.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number for the item that was picked.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expiration date for the item that was picked.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the package number for the item that was picked.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Action Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the action type for the inventory pick line. For posted inventory pick lines, the action type is always Take, meaning that the items are being taken out of the bin.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the special equipment code for the item that was picked.
